title: Kill Tracker
description: Simple plugin to track kills on weapons for extra lore and ability to share your items in the chat.
body:
# Kill Tracker Simple plugin to track unique kills on weapons for extra lore. ## What can it do? Kill tracker has several small features, but mainly focusses on keeping track on given weapons and adding lore. This boosts the pvp community of any server for a purpose to get more kills. It also adds more unique features to items for players to sell them for more if an economy would be involved. ## What other features does it have? - Security options to prevent farming kills. - Admin commands to moderate the plugin. - Share your held item in chat via a simple command. - Kill levels and notifications when reaching a certain level for that weapon. - Kill streaks. - ... ## Commands Kill Tracker contains many commands, here listed the most important ones:
`/kt info` - Shows info about the current weapon you're holding.
`/kt show` - Displays the item in chat for all players to see it.
`/kt reset` - Resets kills on an item.
`/kt set {amount/streak/killed/killer} {amount/name} [#force]` - Sets a specific value to a weapon.
... and many more. Visit [source code](https://github.com/pernio/kill-counter) for all info ## Bugs or suggestions Found a bug or want to suggest a new feature new?
Make a new suggestion here:
https://github.com/pernio/kill-counter/issues
